description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, set on a tan base that resembles a yard or lot. The exterior walls are finished in a light-colored brick or siding, and the house features a prominent covered porch with a dark, flat roof supported by columns. Large, arched windows are visible on one side, providing ample natural light to the interior, while smaller rectangular windows are distributed around the other walls. The roof is primarily flat, with a slight overhang above the porch area. The interior is divided into several rooms, visible from the open roof, and the main entrance is accessible via the porch.
description: A single-story rectangular house with light brick walls, a flat roof, a covered front porch, and large arched windows on one side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long wall with several windows and the covered porch extending from the left.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back wall with small windows and the open layout of the interior rooms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the large arched windows and the main entry door beneath a flat overhang.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the covered porch with columns and the main entrance, as well as the steps leading up to the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched windows and smaller rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a simple door beneath a flat overhang.
